metadata.description: Migrate existing TRACE data to new trace-mcp Python package and set up local TRACE MCP

summary: Verified TRACE setup: trace-mcp v0.1.0 is installed and configured, MCP server is functional, and all v1.0 data has been successfully migrated to the new format (33 code contributions, 6 ideas, 4 decisions, 7 learnings, 4 gotchas, 1 intervention across 4 session files). No action needed.

annotation.content: TRACE migration from v1.0 to v0.1 was already completed on 2026-02-06. All 33 code contributions, 6 ideas, 4 decisions, 7 learnings, 4 gotchas, and 1 intervention are preserved across 4 migrated session files. Minor inconsistency: old sessions use "When Algorithms Meet Artists" (spaces) while new sessions use hyphens.
